definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I have already eaten.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Before or by now; sooner than expected.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Before or by now; sooner than expected.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Are you still here?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Continuing to happen or be in a situation up to the present time.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Continuing to happen or be in a situation up to the present time.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I saw him recently.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: At a recent time; not long ago.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: At a recent time; not long ago.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He eventually found his keys.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: In the end, especially after a long time or much effort.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In the end, especially after a long time or much effort.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I will love you forever.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: For all future time; for eternity.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: For all future time; for eternity.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: First, mix the flour. Finally, bake the cake.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: First, mix the flour. Finally, bake the cake.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce the last item in a sequence.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce the last item in a sequence.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: After three hours, he finally arrived.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: After three hours, he finally arrived.
definitions.usage_context_en: After a long time, typically after difficulty or delay.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: After a long time, typically after difficulty or delay.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He rarely goes to the cinema.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He rarely goes to the cinema.
definitions.usage_context_en: Not often; seldom (approx. 5-10% of the time).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Not often; seldom (approx. 5-10% of the time).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I generally wake up early.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usually; in most cases.]
